category_sources: Official GitHub README describes a Zig implementation of Minisign with signing, verification, and key generation.
source_facts.description says it is Minisign reimplemented in Zig.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README uses the minizign command name.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface and includes compilation, usage, examples, and feature notes.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/jedisct1/zig-minisign, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README documents minizign signing, verification, key generation, and Zig implementation details.
